title: gentianella germanica subsp. solstitialis
intro: Gentianella germanica subsp. solstitialis, also known as summer gentian, is a rare species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to the high-altitude regions of the Pyrenees mountains. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of gentianella germanica subsp. solstitialis include its potential to improve digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infusion, typically in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for digestive issues and respiratory problems.
